build.buildCommand: pip install --upgrade pip && pip install -r requirements.txt && python manage.py collectstatic --noinput

deploy.startCommand: python manage.py migrate && echo "from django.contrib.auth import get_user_model; User = get_user_model(); User.objects.filter(username='qa_adwin').exists() or User.objects.create_superuser('qa_adwin', 'eehernandez@buroidentidad.com', 'pa55w00rd_qa')" | python manage.py shell && gunicorn excel_extractor.wsgi
